Package com.cloudera.cdp.df.model

Class DeployedFlow

java.lang.Object
com.cloudera.cdp.df.model.DeployedFlow
@Generated(value="com.cloudera.cdp.client.codegen.CdpSDKJavaCodegen", date="2026-03-31T14:25:33.758-07:00") public class DeployedFlow extends Object
A flow, potentially one of many, deployed inside a deployment.

      Getter for deploymentCrn. The CRN of the deployment that contains the flow.

      Setter for deploymentCrn. The CRN of the deployment that contains the flow.

      Setter for status. The deployed flow status.

      Getter for deploymentName. The parent deployment name.

      Getter for projectCrn. The CRN of the project that the flow's deployment belongs to.

      Setter for projectCrn. The CRN of the project that the flow's deployment belongs to.

      Getter for updated. Timestamp of the last time the deployed flow was modified.
